form.label: Palo Alto Networks Top Applications and Users (DEPRECATED)

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | dedup src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port direction transport user app _time | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by app,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(created_count) as sum_created_count sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by app nfo_hostname exp_ip_name _time | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sum_created_count) as TotalCreatedCount sum(sum_bytes) as TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by app nfo_hostname exp_ip_name | sort - sum_bytes | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Created flows, TotalCreatedCount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name app "Created flows" "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename app as "Application" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

`netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" app="$Application$" direction=inbound | eval src_dest_user = src_ip."-".dest_ip."/".user | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by src_dest_user,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" app="$Application$" direction=inbound | eval src_dest_user = src_ip."-".dest_ip."/".user | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(created_count) as sum_created_count sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by app src_dest_user _time | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sum_created_count) as TotalCreatedCount sum(sum_bytes) as TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by src_dest_user | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Created flows, TotalCreatedCount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | table src_dest_user "Created flows" "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename src_dest_user as "Source IP – Destination IP / user"

`netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" app="$Application$" direction=outbound | eval src_dest_user = src_ip."-".dest_ip."/".user | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by src_dest_user,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20035` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" app="$Application$" direction=outbound | eval src_dest_user = src_ip."-".dest_ip."/".user | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(created_count) as sum_created_count sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by app src_dest_user _time | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sum_created_count) as TotalCreatedCount sum(sum_bytes) as TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by src_dest_user | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Created flows, TotalCreatedCount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | table src_dest_user "Created flows" "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename src_dest_user as "Source IP – Destination IP / user"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10035: Bandwidth Consumption per Application and Users for Palo Alto Networks” (syslogs with nfc_id=20035). This Module utilizes Palo Alto Networks NetFlow v9 reporting and provides a list of most active applications and users by traffic. Most active applications and users are reported by Network Device over a time interval. The number of reported top most active applications and users (N) and the observation interval (T, sec) are configurable. This Module is packaged in NFO “Palo Alto Networks” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
